title: Kameritverse ( Alien Evolution )
description: "Start your hero journey with a guaranteed Prototype Omnitrix in the Bonus Chest! The ultimate Alien Evolution experience by kamerit."
body:
**🟢 Welcome to the Kameritverse!**

Experience the world of **Ben 10** like never before in this specially curated modpack based on the **Alien Evolution** mod. 

**⌚ Start Your Hero Journey**

Tired of searching for your first watch? In **Kameritverse**, every player starts with a **Prototype Omnitrix** directly in their **Bonus Chest**. No grind, no waiting—just pure alien action from the second you spawn!

**✨ Key Features:**

* 🚀 **Instant Transformation:** Guaranteed Omnitrix in the starter kit.
* 🎮 **Optimized Gameplay:** Smooth performance for the best combat experience.
* 🌍 **Custom Universe:** A world tailored for fans of Alien Force, Ultimate Alien, and Omniverse.
* 🛠️ **Developed by kamerit:** Carefully balanced settings and loot tables.

**🛠️ Requirements:**

* **Memory:** At least 4GB of RAM allocated.
* **Settings:** Make sure to enable **"Bonus Chest"** when creating a new world!

**📜 Credits & Permissions**

As required by authors, here are the links to the mods used in this pack:
* [Corpse Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse)
* [Trade Cycling](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trade-cycling)

---
*Join the adventure and become the ultimate hero in the **Kameritverse**!*
